notes: Quarter-end close on a strong note (Nasdaq ~+20% qtr, VIX calm at 16.5, day P&L green), but bubble-fear chatter and a holiday-shortened week with payrolls Friday warrant caution; cash thin at $53 keeps me at 0.5 with no reach.
journal_entry: Tue 6/30 17:20: held neutral/0.5 into the quarter-end close, VIX 16.5. AMAT record-high stays favored; MU/SNDK soft, ABCL/FCEL overextended remain no-chase. Cash $53 caps adds; bracing for Thursday jobs report (early on holiday week) and watching bubble-fear narrative.
